headline: Marriott Expansion And Tech Overhaul Reshape Growth And Valuation Story
summary: Marriott International (NasdaqGS:MAR) is expanding in the Caribbean and Latin America with a record number of new hotel deals and properties. The company is rolling out a technology transformation focused on modernizing property management and reservations systems. Marriott announced executive changes, including the planned retirement of long-serving CFO Leeny Oberg after 26 years. For you as an investor, this combination of regional expansion, technology investment, and leadership change...
